target_role.name: server
target_role.start_cmd: docker run -d --name target-nginx {target_cpuset_arg}--network perf-net --ip 172.30.0.11 -v {project_dir}/www:/usr/share/nginx/html:ro -v {project_dir}/cloud_bench_configs/nginx-http.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf.template:ro ${DOCKER_NGINX_IMAGE:-nginx:alpine} sh -lc 'sed -E "s/^worker_processes[[:space:]].*;/worker_processes 1;/" /etc/nginx/nginx.conf.template > /tmp/nginx.conf && exec nginx -c /tmp/nginx.conf -g "daemon off;"'
